howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get your personalized AI stack.

steps.description: Explain your sector, goals, and budget in one sentence. Our AI understands the context.
Our engine scans 200+ AI agents and selects the best tools suited to your profile.
Get a complete stack with estimated ROI, monthly costs, and detailed implementation guides.
